automations.name: Virtual call processor
automations.description: Transcript in — ClickUp updated, send-over assets generated, follow-up email drafted.

linked_assets.note: Searches + updates Pipeline tasks (status, description, subtasks) every run. Auto-creates a Pipeline task when an ICP-fit prospect has no existing task.

linked_assets.name: email-draft skill

linked_assets.name: generate-info-pack.py

linked_assets.note: Single Python helper with 8 modes: read_scraped, start_cadence, read_due_today, append_touchpoint, update_outreach_row, move_to_lost, move_to_paused, remove_from_outreach.

coming_next.name: Daily brief — auto-generate every morning, post to Slack
Schedule `clickup-daily` to run automatically at 7:15 AM
Schedule `sales-outreach-run` daily
Wispr archive — save raw drops before processing
Drift audit — flag stale `data/README.md`, loose dept files
Outreach reply triage — auto-draft replies to inbound replies on outreach threads
Pipeline staleness sweep as standalone
Auto-update ClickUp Pipeline from sales call transcripts
Auto-research a prospect before a discovery call (sub-agent run)
Weekly outreach performance report (reply rate by vertical, by cadence step)
Auto-transcript pipeline — Drive watcher kicks off `process-call` when a new Meet/Gemini transcript lands
Wispr-drop processing skill for non-outreach phone calls (clients, partners, in-pipeline prospects)
Lead-to-pipeline skill — when a scraped lead replies with interest, move them into ClickUp Pipeline
Follow-up reminder for stale outreach leads (no contact > N days)
Schedule `dev-voice-ai-intel` weekly
Schedule `marketing-content-research` weekly
Auto-publish LinkedIn posts on a cadence
YouTube video description / thumbnail generation from script
Repurpose podcast / long-form to short-form (Shorts, Reels)
Weekly client performance reports auto-sent
Client check-in scheduling — proactive Calendar suggestions every N weeks
Partner check-in cadence reminders (Leighton, Ladder Co)
Auto-flag dormant clients (no contact >60 days)
Client onboarding automation — after a lead converts in Pipeline, spin up ClickUp project from template, send welcome email, notify Ziv
MRR tracking dashboard / weekly snapshot
Invoice follow-up — auto-chase overdue invoices
Monthly P&L summary
Per-client system health monitoring (response time, conversion)
Auto-detect when a deployed Speed-to-Lead system breaks
Weekly product metrics roll-up
Email triage — auto-label and prioritize incoming Gmail
Calendar prep — daily morning summary of today's meetings with prep notes
Auto-update ClickUp Pipeline from any voice/text mention
Internal-meeting skill — process internal team meetings + sales roleplays. Routes to `~/Desktop/minimise-intel/general/internal-meetings/` + `~/Desktop/minimise-intel/sales/roleplay-calls/`
Smart email drafting — partially live in `email-draft` (already pulls per-person writing style). Track adapt-by-context refinements (cold vs client update vs follow-up)
Post-task notification — Telegram/SMS summary after Claude completes an automated task
Weekly pulse check — Friday roll-up across pipeline, client progress, goals; flag anything off track
